text.title: Supabase MVP Stack Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: 2-tenant SaaS on Supabase
example.note: All tables RLS on; orders scoped to auth.uid()=user_id; tenants scoped to tenant_id=current_tenant_id(); migrations under supabase/migrations/ with PR review; invoices bucket private + signed URLs; Realtime orders:by-tenant payload reviewed (no PII columns). Audit clean. Owner: ruslan@faion.net.

example.title: quickstart leaked
example.note: Two tables with RLS off; permissive policy on orders; column added via dashboard; public bucket invoices; Realtime channel users:all broadcasts email. Public found, CSV scraped, GDPR DSAR fired.
